description: A technician is investigating a recurring problem with a machine and wants to review its entire maintenance history.

nodes.task_description: Identify the asset in the CMMS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent scans the asset's barcode or enters its ID to pull up its record.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve a list of all past maintenance work orders for that asset.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a complete history of all PMs and repairs.

nodes.task_description: Filter the history to show only corrective maintenance for 'motor faults' in the last year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the same motor fault has been reported three times in the past six months.
